def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    expected = [2, 4, 6]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), "Output list should have same length as input list"
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"

from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    expected = [2, 4, 6]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, but got {result}. The last item was likely skipped due to off-by-one error."
